revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>
{{Draft categories|
[[Category:templates with draft categories]]
[[Category:Pages without meta categories]]
}}
{{documentation subpage}} <includeonly> <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> </includeonly>

{{documentation subpage}} <includeonly> <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS -->
[[eo:Ŝablono:USA]] [[krc:Шаблон:USA]] </includeonly>
{{documentation subpage}} <includeonly> <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[bn:টেমপ্লেট:USA]] [[eo:Ŝablono:USA]] [[krc:Шаблон:USA]] </includeonly>

revision.comment: /* Template data */clean up per [[WP:CAT#T]] and [[WP:AWBREQ]] add template:Sandbox other
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 3 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
